creator: lme@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Sorry, this PR was totally under my radar. However I cannot see any 
changes were made to WITH_XFT which was disabled by default since 2006. 
The commit that caused the portrevision bump didn't touch the Xft 
settings. Please see 
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/x11/mrxvt-devel/Makefile?annotate=1.21 
for details. Do you think I this PR should be closed?
